overall.description: A cinematic nighttime scene from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) depicting a moonlit river flowing through a forested wilderness. The camera moves steadily along the rocky riverbank, encounters a horse rider crossing the grassy shore, and continues along the winding water's edge under starry skies.

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the rocky riverbank toward a grassy clearing ahead

entered.detail: dark flowing river reflecting moonlight with visible current
uneven rocky ground along the water's edge with scattered stones
dense pine trees lining the left bank of the river
large illuminated rock formation visible across the river

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a tranquil nighttime view of a river flowing through a forested valley. The camera moves steadily along the rocky shoreline, with dark water flowing on the right and dense trees silhouetted against the night sky on the left. A distant rock formation is visible across the river under the starry sky.

events.description: horse rider enters view from the left shore and begins crossing the grassy bank
horse rider exits to the left as camera continues forward along the river

agents.ego_description: slowing slightly to observe the horse rider crossing the path ahead

notable_agents.action: riding a white horse across the grassy riverbank from right to left

entered.detail: open grassy area replacing the rocky shore where the horse is crossing
white horse with rider moving across the field of view

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts from rocky to grassy as the camera approaches a clearing. A horse rider on a white horse crosses the path from right to left, moving across the grassy riverbank. The camera continues forward as the horse and rider exit the frame to the left, returning focus to the river ahead.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding riverbank past the grassy crossing area

entered.detail: large white rocks scattered in the river and along the right shore

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to the rocky shoreline and continues along the river's winding path. Large boulders become visible in the water and along the banks as the camera moves deeper into the forested area. The trees on the left grow closer as the river bends gently through the moonlit landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit riverbank that transitions from a rocky shoreline through a grassy clearing and back into a dense forest. It begins by gliding steadily past dark waters and silhouetted trees, with a distant rock formation visible under a starry sky. As the terrain shifts from rock to grass, the camera encounters a rider on a white horse crossing the path from right to left before the figure exits the frame. The scene then returns to the rocky shoreline, moving deeper into the wilderness as large boulders emerge in the water. Finally, the camera follows the river's gentle bend, drawing closer to the towering trees that line the moonlit landscape.
